      "question": "What type of recurrence relation is described by the equation $a_n = 2a_{n-1} - a_{n-2}$?",
      "options": ["First Order Linear Inhomogeneous", "Second Order Linear Homogeneous", "Second Order Linear Non-Homogeneous", "First Order Non-Linear"],
      "correct": 1,
